relatedness_reasoning: The inbound file contains pre-approved credit offers from marketing to credit department, while the outbound file reports accounts in arrears status to risk and compliance. These represent fundamentally different business processes: offer origination vs. delinquency monitoring. Only two fields (customer_id and product_type) have any semantic overlap, but the outbound file's core content (arrears status, payment history, delinquency flags) has no source in an inbound offer file. The outbound data would require transaction and payment history records not present in the inbound schema.
